V-DAILY.name: V-DAILY
V-DAILY.summary: Broad daily nutritional support formula intended to support general micronutrient sufficiency and metabolic resilience.
V-DAILY.patient_note: A broad-spectrum foundational option where multiple nutrient-related markers appear softer than expected.

V-GLUTATION PLUS.name: V-GLUTATION PLUS
V-GLUTATION PLUS.summary: Antioxidant and detox-support product intended to support oxidative balance and liver-related resilience.
V-GLUTATION PLUS.patient_note: May be relevant where burden-related, liver-related, or oxidative-support patterns are more prominent.

VITALAGE COLLAGEN.name: VITALAGE COLLAGEN
VITALAGE COLLAGEN.summary: Structural support product intended to support collagen-related tissues including skin, connective tissue, and repair pathways.
VITALAGE COLLAGEN.patient_note: May be relevant where collagen, skin, or tissue-repair-related markers suggest weaker support.

V-OMEGA 3.name: V-OMEGA 3
V-OMEGA 3.summary: Essential fatty acid support product intended to support membrane health, inflammatory balance, and cardiovascular resilience.
V-OMEGA 3.patient_note: May be relevant where essential fatty acid or cardiovascular support patterns are flagged.

V-NITRO.name: V-NITRO
V-NITRO.summary: Circulatory and vitality support product intended to support blood flow, energy, and performance-related resilience.
V-NITRO.patient_note: May be relevant where circulation, vitality, or cardiovascular support patterns are flagged.
